title: Xtra Crispy Kenyan Swede Flatbread
description: A nutty, crispy flatbread made with roasted swede and a double-rise dough that delivers a cozy Kenyan flavor.
instructions: Preheat oven to 220C and line a baking sheet with parchment.
In a large bowl whisk together whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, ground flaxseed, baking powder, and salt.
Stir in olive oil, mashed swede, water, egg, lemon juice, dried thyme, and sesame seeds until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough lightly on a floured surface until smooth, then shape into a ball.
Place the dough ball on a parchment-lined tray, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise for 30 minutes.
After the first rise, roll the dough out to a 12x4 inch rectangle, then cut into 4 equal strips.
Place the strips on the baking sheet, brush the tops with a little olive oil, and bake for 10 minutes.
Flip the strips, brush again, and bake for an additional 8 minutes until golden and crisp.
Let the flatbread cool for 5 minutes, then serve warm with a side of tomato salsa or hummus.
